title: DonutSMPTools
description: DonutSMP Tools includes amethyst shovel, pickaxe and axe all work in correct way all made by Itz6b.
body:
DonutSMP Tools includes amethyst shovel, pickaxe and axe all work in correct way all made by Itz6b.

[Visit our website](https://shockedstudios.netlify.app/)

Prefix: /donutsmptools
usage: /donutsmptools give <player> <tooltype> (gives the player the tool selected)
usage: /donutsmptools reload (reloads the config.yml, to prevent restart or /reload)

Amethyst Pickaxe mines a 3x1 basically breaks 9 blocks.
Amethyst Shovel mines a 3x1 basically breaks 9 blocks.
Amethyst Axe breaks a full entire tree instantly (BETA)
